title: Upstream
description: An Upstream object represents a virtual hostname and can be used to health-check, circuit-break, and load-balance incoming requests over multiple services.

name.description: A hostname which must be equal to the host of a Service.

algorithm.description: The load balancing algorithm to use.

hash_on.description: What to use as hashing input when the consistent-hashing algorithm is selected.

hash_fallback.description: What to use as hashing input if the primary hash_on does not return a hash.

hash_on_header.description: The header name to take the value from as hash input (when hash_on is set to header).

slots.description: The number of slots in the load balancer algorithm.

host_header.description: The hostname to be used as Host header when proxying requests through ring-balancer.

use_srv_name.description: If set, balancer will use SRV hostname as the proxy Host header.
